# GymDo

> BJJ gym management software built from the mat up. Flat pricing, no revenue share, 30-day free trial.

GymDo is a gym management platform built specifically for Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu academies. It provides belt progression tracking (IBJJF-aligned), member retention scoring, class scheduling and booking, Stripe-powered billing, and a native mobile app for members.

Pricing is flat monthly, from $79/mo. No revenue share. No percentage of membership revenue. 30-day free trial, 30-day money back guarantee.

## Pages

- [Home](https://gymdo.app/): Overview, features, pricing, and free trial CTA
- [Features](https://gymdo.app/features): Full feature list for BJJ gym management
- [Belt Tracking](https://gymdo.app/features/belt-tracking): IBJJF-aligned belt progression tracking
- [Member Retention](https://gymdo.app/features/retention): Risk scoring and churn prevention
- [Pricing](https://gymdo.app/pricing): Flat monthly pricing tiers, FAQ
- [About](https://gymdo.app/about): Founder story and mission
